CREATE TABLE test_strings (id UInt32, value String);
SELECT value, reverse(value) AS reversed_value FROM test_strings;
SELECT id, reverse(value) AS reversed_value FROM test_strings WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, reverse(value) AS reversed_value FROM test_strings ORDER BY id DESC;
SELECT id, reverse(value || ' World!') AS extended_reversed FROM test_strings;
SELECT id, reverse(CAST(value AS FixedString(50))) AS fixed_reversed FROM test_strings;
CREATE TABLE test_join (id UInt32, string_id UInt32);
SELECT tj.id, reverse(ts.value) AS reversed_value FROM test_join tj JOIN test_strings ts ON tj.string_id = ts.id;
WITH (SELECT reverse(value) FROM test_strings WHERE id = 2) AS reversed_string SELECT reversed_string;
SELECT tj.id, reverse(CONCAT(ts.value, ': ', tj.id)) AS combined_reversed FROM test_join tj JOIN test_strings ts ON tj.string_id = ts.id;
SELECT id, reverse(value) AS reversed_value FROM test_strings WHERE LENGTH(value) < 10;
SELECT id, reverse(substr(value, 1, 5)) AS short_reversed FROM test_strings;
SELECT id, reverse(value) AS reversed_value, reverse(id) AS reversed_id FROM (SELECT id, value FROM test_strings) t;
